expectations.text: Identifies this as a REFACTORING (structure-only, behavior-preserving), not a transformation
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: Says 'You're in the refactor step... extraction is behavior-preserving, not new behavior. It's plain refactoring', distinct from reaching for a transformation.

expectations.text: Declines to name a numbered / priority-ranked transformation (it belongs to the refactor step)
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: 'the next move isn't to write a new test or reach for a next transformation'; no numbered/priority-ranked transformation is assigned to the cleanup.

expectations.text: Coach, don't drive (no edit / no test run)
